approved_note: Pre-seeded fixture standing in for the Slice 2 rubric approval workflow. Synthetic only.

anchors.1: No evidence the criterion is met
anchors.5: Direct, specific evidence for all elements

criteria.name: Project/program coordination experience
criteria.definition: 3+ years coordinating projects or programs: schedules, deliverables, status reporting across concurrent workstreams.
criteria.evidence_expectations: Named roles with durations; concrete coordination artifacts (plans, status reports, schedules).

criteria.name: Healthcare / public-sector stakeholder experience
criteria.definition: Direct experience working with healthcare or public-sector stakeholders (clinical, policy, or government partners).
criteria.evidence_expectations: Named healthcare/public-sector organizations or stakeholder groups and the candidate's role with them.

criteria.name: Written communication
criteria.definition: Strong written communication evidenced by briefings, minutes, reports, or equivalent artifacts.
criteria.evidence_expectations: Specific document types produced and their audience; the cover letter itself is admissible evidence of writing quality only as a direct sample.

criteria.name: Risk and issue tracking
criteria.definition: Experience with structured risk/issue/dependency tracking and escalation.
criteria.evidence_expectations: Named tools or frameworks (risk register, RAID log) and examples of escalation.

criteria.name: Project-management certification
criteria.definition: PMP, CAPM, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification.
criteria.evidence_expectations: Certification named with status (held / in progress).

criteria.name: Bilingual EN/FR
criteria.definition: Working proficiency in both English and French.
criteria.evidence_expectations: Explicit statement of French proficiency level or French-language work experience.

disqualifying_criteria.name: Work eligibility
disqualifying_criteria.definition: Candidate must be eligible to work in Canada. Absence of a statement is MISSING EVIDENCE, never a disqualification.

prohibited_factors_note: Age, family status, national origin, religion, disability, photographs, address prestige, school prestige, and employment gaps are never scored. See council spec §12.
